mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id as taskId, t1.order_time, t4.issuer_time as required_completion_time, t1.task_code, t2.NAME AS receiver, "任务大厅" AS source, IF ( IFNULL( t3.update_time, 0 ) = 0, 0, 1 ) AS state, t3.working_hours as workingHours, t3.working_hours_id as workingHoursId FROM test_task AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_user AS t2 ON t1.receiver = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN test_task_order_working_hours AS t3 ON t1.id = t3.task_id LEFT JOIN test_report_record AS t4 ON t4.entrustment_id = t1.entrustment_id
1=1 and t3.task_id is not null
and ( t3.user_id = #{receiverUserId})
AND t4.issuer_time >= #{startDate}
AND #{stopDate} >= t4.issuer_time
GROUP BY CONCAT( t1.id, IFNULL( t3.working_hours_id, 0 ) ) ORDER BY t1.end_detection_time desc

SELECT sum( aa.workingHours) FROM ( SELECT t1.id as taskId, t1.order_time, t1.end_detection_time as required_completion_time, t1.task_code, t2.NAME AS receiver, "任务大厅" AS source, IF ( IFNULL( t3.update_time, 0 ) = 0, 0, 1 ) AS state, t3.working_hours as workingHours, t3.working_hours_id as workingHoursId FROM test_task AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_user AS t2 ON t1.receiver = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN test_task_order_working_hours AS t3 ON t1.id = t3.task_id LEFT JOIN test_report_record AS t4 ON t4.entrustment_id = t1.entrustment_id
1=1 and t3.task_id is not null
and (t3.user_id = #{receiverUserId} )
AND t4.issuer_time >= #{startDate}
AND #{stopDate} >= t4.issuer_time
GROUP BY CONCAT( t1.id, IFNULL( t3.working_hours_id, 0 ) ) ORDER BY t1.end_detection_time desc ) as aa
SELECT t1.*, t2.bit_value AS bitValue FROM test_check_items_task_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel AS t2 ON t1.item_id = t2.id WHERE t1.task_id = #{taskId}
